title: Brustkrebs - Symptome, Diagnose & Behandlung | Hirslanden
heading: Brustkrebs

sections.summary: Full-width banner/stage image (oncology header). Wide 4:1 aspect ratio at desktop, 2:1 at mobile. No overlay text.

sections.heading: Brustkrebs
sections.summary: H1 title block with breadcrumb trail above it. Breadcrumb has dropdown sibling navigation for both parent category and peer disease pages.
Lead paragraph introducing the disease: 'Der Brustkrebs, medizinisch Mammakarzinom, ist die häufigste Krebserkrankung bei Frauen...' Short intro paragraph styled larger.
Inline anchor link list for jumping to page sections: 'Entstehung und Ursachen', 'Diagnose', 'Behandlung und Therapie'.

sections.heading: Entstehung und Ursachen
sections.summary: H2 section with inline side image (ultrasound patient photo). Text covers causes: familial predisposition, BRCA1/BRCA2 mutations, hormone therapy, obesity. Biological subtypes (Hormonrezeptor-Positive, HER2-Positive) mentioned.

sections.heading: Symptome und Diagnose
sections.summary: H2 section. Describes self-examination, symptoms (lumps, nipple changes, discharge, shape changes), mammography from age 50, biopsy for confirmation. Inline link to explainer video.

sections.heading: Behandlung und Therapie
sections.summary: H2 section. Treatment depends on cancer type and stage. Bullet list: hormone-positive → anti-hormone therapy; HER2-positive → anti-HER2 drugs. Surgical removal (usually breast-conserving), followed by radiation therapy. Link to radiation therapy treatment page.

sections.heading: Kliniken & Zentren
sections.summary: Dynamically filtered list of 21 clinics and centers treating this disease. Filter by keyword and location (Aarau, Bern, Biel, Cham Zug, Luzern, St. Gallen, Zürich). Each center card shows: name, address, phone, email button, optional opening hours. 'Mehr anzeigen' (load more) button. Paginated.

sections.heading: Schönheits- und Pflegetipps für die Frau
sections.summary: Right sidebar column. Image teaser linking to a PDF download. Pink flower image, title and short description text. Links to: /content/dam/corporate/downloads/de/oncology/hirslanden-brustkrebs-pflegetipps-patientinnen.pdf

sections.heading: Die Brust richtig abtasten
sections.summary: Right sidebar column. YouTube video teaser (play icon overlay on thumbnail image). Links to YouTube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dAaFcl2Ysm4
Right sidebar column. Full-width infographic image (Brustkrebs infographic DE) inside a bordered section. Image is zoomable/enlarge-linked to full size.
Right sidebar column. Single PDF download: 'Infografik die Brust richtig abtasten' (PDF, 2.00 MB). Icon + file name + size.

sections.heading: Publikationen
sections.summary: Right sidebar column. Dynamic list of 22 related publications (articles, videos, PDFs). Filtered, paginated (5 per page), load-more button. Each item: icon (video/PDF/article), title, publication series, author, date.

ctas.text: Schönheits- und Pflegetipps für die Frau (PDF)

symptoms: Knoten oder Verhärtungen in der Brust

layoutNotes: Note: The AEM dev server (localhost:3000) proxies to main--stardust-site-eds--paolomoz.aem.page which does not yet have disease detail pages migrated — all /de/corporate/krankheitsbilder/* URLs return 404. Data was fetched directly from the live site https://www.hirslanden.ch. The page uses a two-column grid layout (66%/33%): left main column contains lead text, in-page nav anchors, rich text sections (origins/causes, symptoms/diagnosis, treatment), and a filterable Kliniken & Zentren list; right sidebar column contains a PDF teaser card, YouTube video teaser, infographic image (zoomable), PDF download, and a paginated publications list. The hero image is a full-width stage above the header/breadcrumb block. The breadcrumb includes expandable sibling navigation dropdowns. Images are served via Adobe Scene7 CDN (mediclinic.scene7.com) with responsive srcset. The page has Schema.org MedicalCondition structured data and a BreadcrumbList. No ICD code is surfaced in the visible HTML (only symptoms tags in meta itemprop attributes).
